title: Dimitar Radev: Money growth - Bulgaria in the eurozone
body:
Speech by Mr. Dimitar Radev, Governor of the BNB, at the opening of the "Money growth: Bulgaria in the eurozone" conference, organised by Capital newspaper, Sofia, 13 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260519f.htm

title: Christine Lagarde: The courage to build a Europe that endures
body:
Speech by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the dinner preceding the Charlemagne Prize ceremony, Aachen, 13 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260518f.htm
